visual: Feet parallel shoulder-width apart, arms hanging softly at the sides, body relaxed and upright — the neutral pre-form standing posture.
motion_description: The person maintains a static standing posture with feet parallel and shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and body weight evenly distributed. The arms hang down at the sides, slightly rounded at the elbows, with hands open and palms facing inward and slightly backward. The torso is held upright and facing straight forward, with the entire pose remaining motionless throughout the clip.
